tasks.subject: Task 1: MYOB Payslip Parser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure async function that extracts all payslip fields from a MYOB PDF, with detect + dispatch entry points and a passing unit test against the real fixture.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/fixtures/payslips/myob/payslip_sample.pdf`
- Create: `lib/parsers/payslips/detect.ts`
- Create: `lib/parsers/payslips/myob.ts`
- Create: `lib/parsers/payslips/index.ts`
- Create: `tests/unit/parsers/payslips/myob.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `parseMyobPayslip` returns correct values for all fields against the real fixture
- [ ] `detectPayslipFormat` returns `'myob_pdf_v1'` for the MYOB sample
- [ ] `dispatchPayslip` throws `UnknownFormatError` for a non-payslip buffer
- [ ] All unit tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run tests/unit/parsers/payslips/myob.test.ts` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/parsers/payslips/detect.ts", "lib/parsers/payslips/myob.ts", "lib/parsers/payslips/index.ts", "tests/unit/parsers/payslips/myob.test.ts", "tests/fixtures/payslips/myob/payslip_sample.pdf"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/unit/parsers/payslips/myob.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseMyobPayslip returns correct values for all fields", "detectPayslipFormat returns myob_pdf_v1 for the MYOB sample", "dispatchPayslip throws UnknownFormatError for non-payslip buffer", "All unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Tax Estimation Domain Module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure `estimateTax` function applying ATO 2025-26 brackets, Medicare levy, and LITO, with full test coverage of bracket boundaries and edge cases.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/domain/tax.ts`
- Create: `tests/unit/domain/tax.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Each ATO bracket boundary returns correct tax
- [ ] Medicare levy applied correctly above and below threshold
- [ ] LITO phases out correctly between $37,500–$66,667
- [ ] Annualisation scales both gross and PAYG by totalWeeks/weeksElapsed
- [ ] Deductions reduce taxable income (clamped to 0)
- [ ] All unit tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run tests/unit/domain/tax.test.ts` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/domain/tax.ts", "tests/unit/domain/tax.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/unit/domain/tax.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ATO bracket boundaries return correct tax", "Medicare levy correct above/below threshold", "LITO phases out correctly", "Annualisation scales correctly", "Deductions clamped to 0", "All unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Payslip Upload Endpoint + UI Button
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `POST /api/payslips/upload` parses a MYOB PDF synchronously and inserts into the DB; a client-side upload button appears on the `/income/payslips` page.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/db/queries/payslips.ts` — add `createPayslipRecord`
- Create: `app/api/payslips/upload/route.ts`
- Create: `components/payslip-upload-button.tsx`
- Modify: `app/(authenticated)/income/payslips/page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] POST with valid MYOB PDF returns 200 `{ ok: true, payslipId }`
- [ ] Unknown PDF format returns 422
- [ ] Unauthenticated request returns 401
- [ ] Payslip appears in the list after upload
- [ ] `link-payslips` job enqueued after insert

**Verify:** Upload fixture PDF via UI button, verify it appears in payslips list.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/db/queries/payslips.ts", "app/api/payslips/upload/route.ts", "components/payslip-upload-button.tsx", "app/(authenticated)/income/payslips/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST valid MYOB PDF returns 200", "Unknown format returns 422", "Unauthenticated returns 401", "Payslip appears in list after upload"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Tax FY Queries
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two new query functions in `lib/db/queries/tax.ts` that aggregate payslip income and deductible transaction totals for a financial year, with integration tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/db/queries/tax.ts` — add `getPayslipSummaryForFy`, `getDeductibleTotalsForFy`
- Modify: `tests/integration/db/queries/tax.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `getPayslipSummaryForFy` sums gross + PAYG, excludes out-of-window payslips
- [ ] `getDeductibleTotalsForFy` groups by deductionKind, returns absolute amounts
- [ ] Integration tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run tests/integration/db/queries/tax.test.ts` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/db/queries/tax.ts", "tests/integration/db/queries/tax.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/integration/db/queries/tax.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getPayslipSummaryForFy sums correctly and excludes out-of-window", "getDeductibleTotalsForFy groups by kind with absolute amounts", "All integration tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Tax Estimate Page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `/tax/estimate` page displaying projected gross, deductions breakdown, and estimated tax outcome; "Estimate" tab added to the Tax sub-nav.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/(authenticated)/tax/layout.tsx`
- Create: `app/(authenticated)/tax/estimate/page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] "Estimate" tab visible in Tax nav
- [ ] Empty state shown when no payslips for current FY
- [ ] Income panel shows projected gross and PAYG
- [ ] Deductions panel shows totals by kind or empty state
- [ ] Outcome panel shows refund/liability in correct colour
- [ ] Low-data caveat shown when < 26 weeks
- [ ] Disclaimer visible
- [ ] Page type-checks cleanly

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors. Navigate to `/tax/estimate` in dev server.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/(authenticated)/tax/layout.tsx", "app/(authenticated)/tax/estimate/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Estimate tab visible in Tax nav", "Empty state when no payslips", "Income panel shows projected values", "Outcome shows refund/liability with colour", "Disclaimer visible"]}
```
